--- title: "Social activities" --- ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Warning: package 'officer' was built under R version 4.5.2 ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Warning: package 'docxtractr' was built under R version 4.5.3 ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Attaching package: 'docxtractr' ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` The following object is masked from 'package:officer': read_docx ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Social Activities Program
X. Name Description Time.and.Duration Location Price
1 Walking along the oceanfront Enjoy a guided group walk, setting off from the conference venue, and exploring the oceanfront along Mooloolaba and Maroochydore! The whole group will stay together from 1:30pm-3:30pm, then there will be an option to continue walking or stop for refreshments.Group schedule for walking:1:30pm – 2:00pm: Explore the rocky beach front across from the Mantra Mooloolaba (conference venue)2:00pm – 3:30pm: Walk north along ocean front heading to Maroochydore Beach (approx. 45 min one-way) and back, exploring beaches, cafés and shops 3:30pm – onwards: Either:Walk south to The Wharf (approx. 15 min) and have refreshmentsWalk to mouth of Mooloolaba River (approx. 35 minutes one-way) and then to The Wharf to have refreshments Departure time: 1:30pmDuration: Walking ~ 2 hours, plus optional extra walking from 3:30pm onwards.Refreshments: as long as you like! Departure location: Mantra MooloolabaGroup walking final location 3:30pm: Mantra MooloolabaOptional walking locations from 3:30pm onwards:The Mooloolaba WharfMouth of Mooloolaba River and back, then to the Mooloolaba Wharf No cost for the walkingSelf-funding required for cafés, shops, and refreshments
2 Aquaduck Explore Mooloolaba by land and sea on the Aquaduck Sunshine Coast. Departing directly in front of SEA LIFE Sunshine Coast, Aquaduck combines the best sights of Mooloolaba into one fun and exciting tour.www.aquaduck.com.au/sunshine-coast/ Departure time: 2pm (check in 20 mins before departure, which will be 1:40pm)Duration: 1 hour Departure location: Near the Mooloolaba Aquarium, but the street side. Group bookings available: with a minimum of 15, max of 29, and there will be a discount on the $56/head but depends on group size.Bar not available.
3 Mooloolaba Canal Cruise at Sunset Leave the land behind for a relaxing change of pace cruising through the calm waters of the Mooloolah River on Mooloolaba’s most popular canal cruise. Board your cruise from the Mooloolaba Wharf for a tranquil journey through the heart of Mooloolaba. Step onboard our 1-hour cruise and immerse yourself in our Skipper’s live commentary, ensuring you not only see the sights but also learn about the region’s rich history and significance.https://www.mooloolabacanalcruise.com/ Departure time: sunset (arrive 15 mins before departure, which will be ~6:10pm)Duration: 1 hour The Wharf Mooloolaba (near the aquarium). The exact address is 123 Parkyn Parade Mooloolaba, QLD, 4557. If you head through the Wharf complex towards the water, you will see our beautiful vessel the M.V.Mudjimba (located behind Rice Boi restaurant) $35 per person for a group booking of min 15 and max 35.Bar available.
4 Ginger Factory One of the Sunshine Coast’s most popular attractions, The Ginger Factory has been delighting families for more than 40 years. Home of Buderim Ginger, the World’s Finest GingerTM, visitors can explore the beautiful nine-hectare property and factory on our tours and rides. It is the world’s largest operating ginger factory and produces a large range of delicious and locally made ginger drinks, sweets, spreads and foods. The iconic Ginger Factory also boasts boutique shopping, a café and ice creamery, lush sub-tropical gardens and exciting rides.https://www.gingerfactory.com.au/Tours (group will do together):Tastes of Ginger tourLive Bee ShowGinger Train RideFunctions guide contains more details about the tours: https://www.gingerfactory.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/GF-Group-Packages-2026-2027.pdf Bus departure time: 1pmArrive at Ginger Factory: 1:30pmTastes of Ginger tour 40minsLive Bee Show 40 minsGinger Train Ride 15minsLeave Ginger Factory via bus at 4:15pmReturn to Mantra Mooloolaba 5:15pm Bus departure location: Mantra MooloolabaLocation of Ginger Factory: 50 Pioneer Road, Yandina, Sunshine Coast, QLD 4561Bus return location: Mantra Mooloolaba Cost: $72.50Includes: Bus fare $32.50Taste of Ginger tour $15Live Bee Show $15Ginger Train Ride $10
5 Montville Free time in Montville to explore the many shops and art galleries along the main strip.Suggested group afternoon tea at Poets Café at 3:30pm (optional).https://www.montvilleguide.com.au/montville-shoppinghttps://www.montvilleguide.com.au/montville-dining Bus departure time: 1pmArrive at Montville 2:15pmAfternoon tea at Poets Café 3:30pmLeave Montville via bus at 5pmReturn to Mantra Mooloolaba 5:45pm Bus departure location: Mantra MooloolabaMontville is centrally placed on the Queensland's Sunshine Coast, about ~30km west of Mantra Mooloolaba.Bus return location: Mantra Mooloolaba Cost: $32.50 (bus fare)Self-funding required for cafés, shops, etc.
````` ::: :::
